description: International criminal gang originating in Los Angeles, California in the 1980s, initially formed to protect Salvadoran immigrants. It expanded through deportations to Central America and is active in the US, Canada, Mexico, and Central America. Engages in drug trafficking, murder, extortion, and other crimes. Designated as a terrorist organization by the US, Canada, and El Salvador.

country_links.evidence_quote: a structured network of MS-13 operations... in countries around the globe including... Australia
country_links.context: MS-13 has operations in Australia as part of its global network.

country_links.evidence_quote: some Central American gang members were seeking refugee status in Canada... 'We know that there are members of Mara 18 and MS-13 who are in Canada and are seeking to stay there'
country_links.context: MS-13 members are present in Canada, seeking refugee status and operating there.

country_links.evidence_quote: The lack of a proper police force meant that deported gangsters faced little opposition when establishing MS-13 in El Salvador.
country_links.context: MS-13 established itself in El Salvador after members were deported there, and it became a significant arms trafficker, extortionist, and assassin in the country.

country_links.evidence_quote: a structured network of MS-13 operations... in countries around the globe including... France
country_links.context: MS-13 has operations in France as part of its global network.

country_links.evidence_quote: Violence by MS-13 against immigrants on the Guatemala–Mexico border is portrayed in the movie La vida precoz y breve de Sabina Rivas (2012)...
country_links.context: MS-13 violence against immigrants on the Guatemala–Mexico border is portrayed in a film.

country_links.evidence_quote: On December 23, 2004, one of the most widely publicized MS-13 crimes in Central America occurred in Chamelecón, Honduras, when an intercity bus was intercepted and sprayed with automatic gunfire from assault rifles, killing 28 and wounding 21 civilian passengers...
country_links.context: MS-13 carried out a massacre on a bus in Chamelecón, Honduras, killing 28 people.

country_links.evidence_quote: a structured network of MS-13 operations... in countries around the globe including... Korea
country_links.context: MS-13 has operations in Korea as part of its global network.

country_links.evidence_quote: Mara Salvatrucha leaders in Mexico have brokered deals with the Zetas, Gulf, Jalisco New Generation, and Sinaloa cartels in order to obtain narcotics and firearms.
country_links.context: MS-13 leaders in Mexico have brokered deals with Mexican cartels to obtain narcotics and firearms, and the gang has been violent to migrants on the southern border of Mexico.

country_links.evidence_quote: a structured network of MS-13 operations... in countries around the globe including... Peru
country_links.context: MS-13 has operations in Peru as part of its global network.

country_links.evidence_quote: Under the coordination of the gang's leadership in El Salvador, Mara Salvatrucha formed five clicas in Spain as part of the gang's Programa 34 expansionist program.
country_links.context: MS-13 formed five clicas in Spain as part of its Programa 34 expansion, operating legitimate businesses for money laundering and providing employment and visas.

country_links.evidence_quote: On June 22, 2008, in San Francisco, California, a 21-year-old MS-13 gang member, Edwin Ramos, shot and killed a father, Anthony Bologna, 48, and his two sons Michael, 20, and Matthew, 16...
country_links.context: MS-13 carries out murders, drug trafficking, and other criminal activities across multiple U.S. states.
